context: [Etienne-Louis Arthur Fallot (1850-1911), physician of forensic medicine and hygiene in Marseille, France] =  underdevelopment of pulmonary infundibulum ← unequal partitioning of conotruncus = anterior malalignment of conal septum Frequency:   8-11% of all CHD; most common cyanotic CHD Prevalence:   3.3÷100,000 live births TETRAD: Embryology: abnormal spiraling caudad growth of truncoconal ridges in 3rd-4th week causes unequal partitioning of the conotruncus into a small underdeveloped anteromedial pulmonary infundibulum + large posterolateral LV outflow tract Hemodynamics: fetus:   pulmonary
